# Transp. Code
## Title 6
### Chapter 223. Bids & Contracts for Highway Projects
##### § 223.153 — Solicitation of Proposals

The department shall solicit proposals under this subchapter using the procedure by which the department procures services under Subchapter A (Short Title) , Chapter 2254 (Professional and Consulting Services) , Government Code.

*Added by Acts 1997, 75th Leg., ch. 165, Sec. 30.15(a), eff. Sept. 1, 1997.*

subsections.text: The department shall solicit proposals under this subchapter using the procedure by which the department procures services under Subchapter A (Short Title) , Chapter 2254 (Professional and Consulting Services) , Government Code.
